6 Pieces
Luxury Streetwear

A full A/W collection proposal for a premium streetwear brand. The brief was to design a 6 piece menswear collection that feels like an extension of their current collection, focusing on luxury streetwear aesthetic.

Highstreet Fashion — AW26 Womenswear Trend Direction · Collection Proposal · Full Tech Packs
Trend Research
Womenswear
Full BOM
4-Piece Collection

End-to-end collection proposal for a highstreet store. Focusing on AW26 "Modern Heritage" trend direction — tweed, bouclé, structured tailoring. Four full tech packs: tweed trench (wool blend, tonal satin lining, tortoiseshell buttons), pussy-bow blouse, bouclé jacket with frayed trim, and high-rise flared wool trousers. Full BOMs with construction callouts throughout.

In Print We Trust — SS25 Boxer Shorts Concept 3 Designs · Moodboards · Tech Packs · Styling Mockups
Print Design
3 Colourways
Styling Mockups
Embroidery Spec

Full concept pitch for a print-focused womenswear label. Three designs — leopard cherry print boxers, pink/red striped cotton shorts, and a "lucky" embroidered white — each with moodboard, tech pack, fabric swatch, custom embroidered label spec and button spec. Presented with full outfit styling mockups.
